headline: Doug Ford's $21M GRAVY PLANE 😩✈️💸 Owns the Haters!
text:
Ontario's BIG DADDY Doug Ford 🍑👨‍💼 just DROPPED 💥 C$28.9M ($21M 🤑) on a THICC pre-owned Bombardier Challenger 650 🛩️🇨🇦 – built in CANUCKLAND 2016! 🚀 Opposition SIMPS 🤡 like Marit Stiles 😤 (NDP QUEEN 👑🔴) are MELTING DOWN 😱💦, calling it 'GRAVY PLANE' 🥛✈️ and screeching 'FLY ECONOMY PLEB 🚫💺 like US POOR FOLK paying rent & groceries 😩🥦!' Taxpayer cucks at Canadian Taxpayers Federation 📉😠 yelling 'REVERSE IT, FLY COMMERCIAL 🛫🐑!' But Ford's squad 💪 hits back: 'GOV BIZ ONLY 📜🔒 – FLEXIBLE, SECURE travel across Ontario (TWICE Texas BIG 🗺️🐂) + US tariff SMACKDOWNS 👊🇺🇸 against TRUMPSTER 🍊👹!' 

Ford's been JET-SETTING ✈️🌎 like a BOSS – fresh from Texas BBQ 🤠🌮 with Gov Abbott & auto bros 🚗💨, previously CHARTERING privates 💰🛩️. Defends price like 'Quebec PAID C$107M 😱 for 3 Challengers 🛫 (air ambulance flex 🏥🚁) & Canada DROPPED C$753M on 6 Global 6500s 🤑🔥 for PM & military ops!' History repeats? 1981 Bill Davis got ROASTED 🔥 for Challenger buy, turned it air ambulance then SOLD for fire bombers 💦🧯 – but Ford ain't folding! 😤💪 Won THIRD MAJORITY 👑📈 last year, approval at 31% low 😢 (Angus Reid poll 📊📉) but US fame? SLAYING Fox News spots 📺🇺🇸 & anti-tariff ads FEATURING REAGAN GHOST 🪦🤠 that PISSED OFF TRUMP 🍊😡, halting trade talks 🚫🤝! 

Wall Street? Nah, ONTARIO STREET 🧱🍑 cucks SWEATING 😰 over 'OUT OF TOUCH' 🚫💸 but MOMMY FORD 👩‍🍼✈️ says 'HOLD MY GRAVY 🥛🍆' – this jet's fighting TRUMP TARIFFS 🛡️📈 like Jensen fights bubbles! No bubble here bby 👼, just PREMIER THRUSTING ⬆️😩 across borders! Stiles & fedora-tippers 🤡 can CRY 💧 while Ford MOONS the haters 🍑🌙 from 40,000ft! 🚀💨 Toronto Star SPILLED the tea ☕📰 first, now EVERYONE'S CUMMING 💦📈 to the DRAMA! Ford vs Trump tariff ORGY 💥👯‍♂️ – who's popping champagne 🥂 on that gravy plane? 😍✈️‼️
